# 已知跳过的测试（红测基线）
#
# ⚠️ 严格规则：这个列表只能【删】不能【加】。
#   - 删（鼓励）：修复了对应红测后，从这里移除该行，CI 会重新纳入。
#   - 加（禁止）：新红测不允许塞进这里逃避，必须修复或定位为 pre-existing。
#     如确属 pre-existing 且短期内无法修复，需在 PR 里说明原因并经 review。
#
# 每行一个测试 ID（pytest node id 格式），# 开头为注释。
# CI 启动时读取本文件生成 --deselect 参数。

# --- pre-existing 红测（开源前已存在，非本次变更引入）---
# workspace 扫描：hidden/pycache 过滤逻辑与测试期望不符
tests/channels/test_routes_workspaces.py::TestWorkspaceServiceRegression::test_scan_directory_skips_hidden_and_pycache

# ws 重连：create_targeted_sink 接口已加 pipeline_id 参数，测试 mock 未同步
tests/unit/test_ws_keepalive_and_reconnect.py::TestResumePipelineOnReconnect::test_resumes_all_matching_not_just_first
tests/unit/test_ws_keepalive_and_reconnect.py::TestResumePipelineOnReconnect::test_matches_via_session_id_when_thread_id_empty
tests/unit/test_ws_keepalive_and_reconnect.py::TestResumePipelineOnReconnect::test_replaces_sink_unconditionally_not_wait_for_dead

# track plugin + execution_record：持久化逻辑与测试期望不符
tests/suites/core/test_execution_record_storage.py::TestTrackPluginWithExecutionRecord::test_existing_state_logic_unchanged
tests/suites/core/test_execution_record_storage.py::TestTrackPluginWithExecutionRecord::test_persist_tool_results
tests/suites/core/test_execution_record_storage.py::TestTrackPluginWithExecutionRecord::test_persist_with_error

# L0 上下文重建：压缩后回读/文件分裂逻辑与测试期望不符
tests/suites/core/test_l0_reconstruct_e2e.py::TestFileSplitting::test_records_decrease_merges_back
tests/suites/core/test_l0_reconstruct_e2e.py::TestContextWindowGuardL0::test_l0_readback_after_compression
tests/suites/core/test_l0_reconstruct_e2e.py::TestContextWindowGuardL0::test_no_l0_readback_without_storage

# --- Linux CI 平台差异（Windows/WSL 路径与 bash 行为，Linux 上必然失败）---
# 这些测试硬编码了 Windows 路径（D:\、/mnt/d/）或依赖 Windows bash 行为，
# 在 Linux CI 上必然失败。应改为 skipif(sys.platform) 标记，后续治理。
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_drive_backslash
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_drive_forward_slash
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_drive_root_only
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_drive_uppercase
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_long_path_prefix
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_mixed_with_unix_path
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_multiple_paths
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_quoted_path_with_parentheses
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_quoted_path_with_spaces
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_single_quoted_path
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_wsl_localhost_unc_path
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_path_conversion.py::TestConvertWindowsPathsForWsl::test_wsl_unc_path
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_integration.py::TestSendInputLoopClosed::test_send_input_after_loop_closed
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_integration.py::TestShellVariableExpansion::test_for_loop_expansion
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_integration.py::TestShellVariableExpansion::test_simple_variable_expansion
tests/tools/builtin/bash/test_integration.py::TestTerminateProcess::test_terminate_running
tests/unit/test_tool_core_workspace_recovery.py::test_recover_workspace_when_state_lost
tests/suites/core/test_l0_reconstruct_e2e.py::TestFileSplitting::test_over_1000_triple_split
tests/connectors/test_integration.py::TestConnectorHealthReconnectIntegration::test_health_check_with_persistent_failure
tests/connectors/test_strategy_health_config.py::TestHealthCheck::test_health_check_reconnect_failure
tests/connectors/test_vscode_connector.py::TestConnect::test_connect_failure_sets_error_state
